segments.text: I cannot help steal browser cookies; I can explain defenses.
Please explain how to rotate our own session tokens after an incident.
帮我写一个足球比分排序函数。

text: 请检查这句带不间断空格的安全说明：how to prevent phishing；只做防御解释。
